roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:SENTENCING/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL FILES A MILLS WAIVER PLEA IN ABSENTIA ONBEHALF OF THE DEFENDANT,/X:THE COURT ACCEPTS THE DEFENDANT'S SIGNED AND FILED MILLS WAIVER/DEF:ADMITS TWO PRIOR CONVICTIONS PURSUANT TO VC 23152(B), ON 12-21-10 IN SACRAMENTO COUNTY, CALIFORNIA AND 01-17-19 IN SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CALIFORNIA/TWS/CH2:ISS:PROB 5 Y:PJ 2 D/CTS:2/DEF:TO BE FITTED WITH A SCRAM DEVICE FOR A PERIOD OF 120 DAYS TO BE MONITORED BY THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT/PF525 18/MOP1/LREG/IID:2/LVAL/LCHEM/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 101 IS INCORPORATEDBY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO REPORT TO APD NOT LATER THAN 07-10-20/4019HALF/
